title: psorospermum febrifugum var. ferrugineum
intro: Psorospermum febrifugum var. ferrugineum, also known as the Fever Tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Guttiferae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, as well as its ability to induce sweating and relieve fever. The health benefits of Psorospermum febrifugum var. ferrugineum include relief from fever, headaches, and body aches, as well as its potential in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
